ddls:
CREATE TABLE "satellite_imagery" (
  "imagery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each satellite image */,
  "landsat_id" TEXT /* Landsat ID of the image */,
  "date_acquired" TEXT /* Date the image was acquired */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Cloud cover percentage of the image */,
  "image_file" TEXT /* File path to the image file */,
  "spatial_reference" TEXT /* Spatial reference system (e.g., EPSG code) */,
  "acquisition_sensor" TEXT /* Type of sensor used for image acquisition */,
  "processing_level" TEXT /* Level of processing applied to the image */,
  "footprint" TEXT /* Geometry representing the area covered by the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("imagery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gis_layers" (
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GIS layer */,
  "layer_name" TEXT /* Name of the GIS layer */,
  "layer_type" TEXT /* Type of GIS layer (e.g., polygon, line, point) */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path to the GIS layer data */,
  "spatial_reference" TEXT /* Spatial reference system (e.g., EPSG code) */,
  "layer_metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the layer */,
  "layer_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for better search and categorization */,
  "layer_thumbnail" TEXT /* Path to a thumbnail image of the layer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("layer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical dataset */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path to the dataset file */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the historical data */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the dataset */,
  "data_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for better search and categorization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urban_areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each urban area */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the urban area */,
  "geometry" TEXT /* Geometry of the urban area */,
  "holc_id" TEXT /* HOLC ID of the urban area */,
  "holc_grade" TEXT /* HOLC grade of the urban area */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Current population of the urban area */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area in square kilometers */,
  "zoning_classification" TEXT /* Zoning classification */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the urban area data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., planner, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Securely stored password hash */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last user login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Detailed permissions for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maps" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each map */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the map */,
  "map_name" TEXT /* Name of the map */,
  "map_data" TEXT /* Map data (e.g., GeoJSON) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the map was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the map was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the map */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for better search and categorization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maps_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spatial_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spatial analysis */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the analysis */,
  "analysis_name" TEXT /* Name of the analysis */,
  "analysis_data" TEXT /* Analysis data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the analysis was performed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the analysis was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of spatial analysis performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spatial_analysis_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Report data (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
